name: Lockes The Thief
short_description: You are Lockes, the sneakiest man alive! Fight and Sneak in this lo-fi, stealth action adventure that oozes cool!
detailed_description:
Things are about to get busy in this Freshman solo effort by thePadlockesTech.

Play as Lockes The Thief, who, after receiving a mysterious message, goes on an adventure! Members of his tribe The Sneaks, have betrayed the tribe and are planning on working with an enemy tribe, The Soldiers, and stealing a magickal energy source, the unRealistic, which would grant them ultimate power to rule the land.

Lockes, who is loyal to The Sneak Code, wants no part of this and is tasked with defeating his ex-partners, disabling their extreme plot, and destroying their evil plans.

Traverse grassy lands, forests, fortresses and temples. Use your quick hits to defeat your enemy. Use your quick wits to dodge traps and out smart cunning bosses. Sneak and Fight. Collect and Steal cash to upgrade your gear. Embrace The Muse, your Sage companion who guides you.

Steal for the greater good - and yourself of course. A game that oozes cool...
